name: Django Waffle
description: Feature flipper for Django with flags, switches and samples. Stores settings in database, controls via Django admin, supports user/group/percentage targeting.

seo.title: Django Waffle — Feature Flags / Remote Config
seo.meta_description: Django Waffle: Feature flipper for Django with flags, switches and samples. Stores settings in database, controls via Django admin, supports user/group/percenta

when_to_use: Toggle Django features per user, group, or percentage
Database-stored flags controlled via Django admin UI
Sample-based rollout to 1% of traffic for experiments
Instant disable of problematic features without deploy

pros: User, group and percentage targeting out of the box
Tiny surface area, easy to reason about
cons: No native SDK ecosystem or remote config UI
review.verdict: Fine default for small/medium Django apps; outgrow it once you need multi-service or advanced targeting.
review.best_for: Django monoliths that need simple, in-process flags
